instructions: After getting approved affiliate URLs, update content/tools.json affiliate_url fields, rebuild with 'npm run build', commit and push to revenue-site branch.
next_steps: Check email for ElevenLabs, Descript, Writesonic approvals
Complete Grammarly signup manually on impact.com
Complete Synthesia signup with a business email (not Gmail)
Once approved, update config/affiliate-links.json with real affiliate URLs
Rebuild site: cd ai-tools-hub && npm run build
